regions.text: No, the girl is nearer to the woman. Yes, the girl is nearer to the boy than to the woman.
The girl is farther from the tree. Yes, the boy is farther from the tree than from the girl.
The glass to the left is full of water.
No. There is more water than land on the south side of the earth.
C is a half moon; B is a full moon; D is a quarter moon; and A is a new moon.
The price of the book was $2.50. It was $2.50. He gave me 50 cents change.
A quick train may go a hundred miles in an hour. I may go four miles but not forty.
Ships, trains, horses and carriages, and airplanes are different sorts of transport. The airplane is the quickest of these.
